repository_role: HELIX umbrella architecture and coordination registry

resolution_rules.current_default_branch_head: Resolve from live GitHub metadata. Embedded commit SHAs are historical observations and must not be treated as the current head after later commits or merges.
resolution_rules.open_pull_requests: Resolve from live GitHub metadata. Do not maintain a supposedly canonical embedded open-PR list that becomes stale when this file is committed.
resolution_rules.temporary_write_authority: A temporary write claim is valid only for its named repository branch, declared paths, and open pull request. It expires automatically when that pull request closes or merges.
resolution_rules.current_ci_review_and_merge_gate: Resolve from live GitHub workflow, review, pull-request and approval metadata for the exact current head. Do not embed a current pass, pending or approval state as canonical project truth.
source_precedence: live GitHub repository, pull-request, review and CI metadata
ChatGPT project instructions and conversation memory

trusted_baseline.observation_semantics: Historical observation of main immediately after HELIX30000 PR #4 merged. Live GitHub determines the current head.

workstreams.write_owner: HELIX — Coordination and Reality Control conversation
workstreams.objective: Reconcile HELIX30000 after PR #4 merged by recording the completed persistence-charter increment, preserving the missing independent-review exception, releasing the expired PR #4 write claim, and keeping future dedicated-repository creation as a separate explicit action.
workstreams.status_resolution: Resolve the pull-request number, exact current head, CI, reviews and merge approval from live GitHub metadata.
workstreams.authority_expiry_condition: This temporary one-file write claim expires automatically when its pull request closes or merges.
verification_criteria: the exact pull-request diff contains only .project/active-work.json
PR #4 is recorded as merged at be6ec9bf6d84a5fa4b0a5ef4b22edd5cbc37eb26
PR #4 exact-head CI run 29944855896 remains recorded as successful
the absence of independent review remains visible as a governance exception
the expired PR #4 temporary workstream is no longer active
the persistence charter remains design authority only
no dedicated repository, database schema, deployment, legacy import, runtime, workflow, registry, test, credential, cloud or external-repository file changes
workstreams.next_gate: Obtain exact-head CI for the final PR #6 coordination head, confirm the diff remains exactly one file, and keep merge as a separate explicit decision.

pull_request_state_resolution.pull_request_identifier_semantics: The pull-request number identifies the temporary reconciliation workstream after creation. Its state, head, CI, reviews and merge status must be resolved live.

next_bounded_candidate.safe_scope: Create a dedicated repository only after explicit approval, then begin with documentation, machine-readable entity and transition contracts, integrity rules, failure and replay requirements, query requirements, and validation tests without database deployment.
prohibited_without_new_authorization: legacy HelixMemoryService code or data import

authority_boundary.helix30000_control_tower: coordination-only outside an explicitly declared temporary workstream; stable role does not grant repository-write authority
authority_boundary.persistence_workspace: merged design authority only; no dedicated implementation repository or branch authority exists
authority_boundary.future_persistence_repository: not created and no repository authority exists
authority_boundary.helix_memory_service: read-only legacy prototype evidence; not canonical HELIX persistence and not imported
authority_boundary.protocol_kernel: read-only contract dependency; no external repository writes
authority_boundary.contextos: read-only boundary dependency; no external repository writes
authority_boundary.service_tracer: read-only evidence source; no external repository writes
